description: Mapping from WR Drive import-prefix source paths to canonical target folders. Informed by stage4/WR-DISCOVERY-SUMMARY.md §4.2 and stage4/data/wr-canonical-folders.json. 'target_drive_folder_id' is null for folders that must be created by the reorg script.
structure_reconciliation_choice: Option A — evolve target to match Drive + additions. Keep Operational (do not rename to Operations). Keep Regulatory, Stakeholder Engagement, Correspondence, Templates. Add Commercial, HR, Legal, Marketing, Technical as top-level Drive folders.

mapping_rules.rationale: Company admin files map to governance
Direct semantic match with existing Regulatory/

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from Dropbox/07 OPERATIONS, QUALITY AND RISK MANAGEMENT
mapping_rules.rationale: Operations/QA/Risk maps to existing Operational/ (Option A: keep Operational name)

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from Dropbox/05 MARKETING AND COMMUNICATION
mapping_rules.rationale: Creates new Marketing/ folder
Creates new Technical/ folder
Most projects are the PPP programme; ambiguous for non-PPP projects — flagged

Strategic partnerships → new Commercial/ (P1 flagged ambiguity with Stakeholder Engagement; choosing Commercial because partnerships are contractual/commercial in nature, stakeholder engagement is for regulator/community touchpoints)

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from Dropbox/01 RESEARCH DEVELOPMENT/01.02  BluePath/Statistical Data
mapping_rules.rationale: Archive Drive files; flag source_file prefix for re-index exclusion (per P1 §5 Layer 3)
Non-BluePath research/development → Reference (catch-all for research outputs)

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from Dropbox/00 EXTERNAL SHARE ZONES/00.02 LGG Advisory
mapping_rules.rationale: Canonical investor-relations updates (Dropbox copies already deleted by dedup Layer 1; SharePoint master remains)

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from Dropbox/00 EXTERNAL SHARE ZONES
mapping_rules.rationale: External share zones are investor-facing updates by default; ambiguous for non-IR content

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from Dropbox/ZZ Legacy Folders Unfiled
mapping_rules.rationale: Legacy/unfiled content — default to archive; P5 may surface specific files for reclassification
App-related content best fits Technical/; small volume

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from SharePoint/Water Roads - Internal VDR
mapping_rules.rationale: Internal VDR = data room

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from SharePoint/00.02 LGG Advisors Master
mapping_rules.rationale: Master LGG prospect tree
Diligence materials → data room
ESOP → HR (creates HR/ and HR/ESOP/)
Direct match with existing canonical sub-folder
Information Memorandum = investor updates
Carbon/environmental impact → Technical/Environmental
Proposal → investor updates

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from SharePoint/Key Stakeholders_ AU Water Roads
mapping_rules.rationale: Direct match
Regional engagement materials — fits stakeholder engagement

mapping_rules.source_prefix: Imported from SharePoint/Ocean Zero response materials
mapping_rules.rationale: RFP-style response to Ocean Zero — treat as programme document
RFP responses → programme documents (ambiguous if non-PPP RFPs appear — flag)
Teaser material = early-stage investor update
Valuation models → Financial/Business Case
Test picture folder — archive
Loose pictures without context — archive by default (may be reclassified by P5)
Top-level Drive folder of unknown provenance — archived for traceability (5 email-intake rows reference it)

unmapped_prefixes_to_flag_during_reorg: Any file under Imported from … not matching a prefix above must be logged by the reorg script and left in place (moved to Archive/Unclassified at the end of TASK 3.5).
notes: Rule ordering matters: the reorg script must match longer prefixes before shorter ones (e.g. '01 RESEARCH DEVELOPMENT/01.02  BluePath/Statistical Data' must be tested before '01 RESEARCH DEVELOPMENT').
Folder replicas (LGG Advisory copy*, water_roads_webflow_handoff N) were deleted from Supabase in TASK 3.1. The Drive folders themselves remain; TASK 3.5 handles residual import folders.

Only Supabase-referenced files need source_file updates (TASK 3.4). Drive-only files (not indexed by Paperclip) may still be moved by the reorg; their Drive IDs just do not appear in the Supabase documents table.
